name: Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and butter, pressing the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
2. Melt the caramel candies in a heavy 1 1/2 quart saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour the mixture over the crust.
3. Top with chopped pecans.
4. Combine the softened cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla in a bowl. Mix at medium speed with an electric mixer until well-blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Blend in the melted chocolate chips.
7. Pour over the pecans.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and chill.
9. Garnish with whipped cream, additional chopped nuts, and maraschino cherries if desired.
